news.t: Weave Bio Establishes Inaugural Strategic Advisory Board to Shape the Future of AI-Driven Regulatory Science
This legendary investor has been shorting Treasury bonds. Here's how to bet with him — without going broke.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily 20+ Year Treasury Bear 3X ETF (TMV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the US Treasury 20+ Year index. The fund provides -3x daily exposure to a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury bonds with over 20 years to maturity. TMV was launched on Apr 16, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.
